Package BusinessLayer

Class Component

java.lang.Object
BusinessLayer.Component
Direct Known Subclasses:
AND, LED, NAND, NOR, NOT, OR, Switch, XOR
public abstract class Component extends Object
Abstract base class for all circuit components.

Each component has a position, dimensions, and a list of input/output pins. Components can be drawn on a canvas, moved, selected, and can compute their outputs based on their input values.

Subclasses must implement the drawing logic, computation logic, and pin management.

  • Constructor Details

    • Component

      public Component(int x, int y)
      Constructs a component at a given position.
      Parameters:
      x - X coordinate of the top-left corner
      y - Y coordinate of the top-left corner

  • Method Details

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns the X coordinate of the component.
      Returns:
      X coordinate

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns the Y coordinate of the component.
      Returns:
      Y coordinate

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Returns the width of the component.
      Returns:
      Width in pixels

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Returns the height of the component.
      Returns:
      height in pixels

    • draw

      public abstract void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the component on the given graphics context.
      Parameters:
      g - Graphics context

    • compute

      public abstract void compute()
      Compute output values based on input values. Each component type implements its own logic.

    • initializePins

      protected abstract void initializePins()
      Initialize pins for this component. Called by subclass constructors.

    • updatePinPositions

      protected abstract void updatePinPositions()
      Update pin positions when component moves. Called automatically from move().

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Point p)
      Checks if a given point is within the component bounds (with a small padding).
      Parameters:
      p - Point to test
      Returns:
      True if point is inside the component

    • move

      public void move(int nx, int ny)
      Moves the component to a new position. Also updates all connected wires and pins.
      Parameters:
      nx - New X coordinate
      ny - New Y coordinate

    • updateConnectedWires

      protected void updateConnectedWires()
      Update all wires connected to this component's pins. Called automatically when component moves.

    • setSelected

      public void setSelected(boolean s)
      Sets the selection state of the component.
      Parameters:
      s - True if selected, false otherwise

    • isSelected

      public boolean isSelected()
      Returns whether the component is currently selected.
      Returns:
      True if selected

    • getInputPins

      public ArrayList<Pin> getInputPins()
      Returns the list of input pins.
      Returns:
      ArrayList of input pins

    • getOutputPins

      public ArrayList<Pin> getOutputPins()
      Returns the list of output pins.
      Returns:
      ArrayList of output pins

    • findNearestPin

      public Pin findNearestPin(int px, int py, int threshold)
      Find the nearest pin to the given coordinates within threshold.
      Parameters:
      px - X coordinate
      py - Y coordinate
      threshold - Maximum distance in pixels
      Returns:
      Nearest pin or null if none within threshold

    • cloneComponent

      public abstract Component cloneComponent()
      Creates a deep copy of this component. Subclasses must implement to return an exact copy of themselves.
      Returns:
      Cloned component
